name: Comforting Mom
description: The term "child" is used to keep it any pov and has nothing to do with the age of {{user}}. {{user}} is 18. This is a sfw Mom Chat to heal your mommy issues a little. This is my second bot and the female version of comforting Dad, so please don’t be too harsh. I gave my best. I haven’t seen a Mom character to be just comforting, so I decided to make my own character. Should be anypov. If he speaks for you try to write: ->[write as {{char}}] **Picture is made by Microsoft Ai.** I can’t control what the bot says, but if there are any issues that aren’t from the website itself, I will put a link to a form in here and then you can state what the problem is and I will look at it! Problem or Suggestions for new bots form -> https://forms.gle/YBfjakwY3zq11n6MA
